project.name: AI人生操作系统
project.designRead: mobile app / personal life companion / calm editorial / moderate / no loud gradients

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Apple HIG-inspired blues and neutrals, brand-500 #007aff primary, dark mode with background #000000 card #1c1c1e
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: radius 19.2px global, pill buttons, rounded cards and inputs
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: DM Sans for all interface text, JetBrains Mono for data/technical, display 72-96px/600/-0.04em, body 14-16px/400/1.55
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-first cards, subtle shadows, capsule buttons, calm hierarchy
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-led static surfaces, whisper-light shadows, deeper elevation only for overlays
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: SVG icons, natural-light photography, centered product imagery

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationBar: bottom tab bar with 5 tabs: Today, Timeline, Capture(center+FAB), AI, Me
sharedProjectShellContract.statusBar: 44pt system status bar with time and icons
sharedProjectShellContract.safeArea: bottom safe area padding for home indicator
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-first static surfaces, shadow alpha <= 0.05 at rest
